task: Show me recipes for pancakes with wheat and without beetroot.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating to Cookpad, searching for pancake recipes with wheat, and reaching a filtered results page that explicitly shows beetroot excluded. Evidence: the final page title is 'Pancakes Wheat (Without: Beetroot) Home Recipes - Cookpad' at URL https://cookpad.com/eng/search/pancakes%20wheat?event=search.filtered_query&excluded_keywords=beetroot&order=recent, and the page banner shows 'Without: beetroot'. Visible recipe results are listed on that filtered page. This satisfies 'Show me recipes for pancakes with wheat and without beetroot.'
final_result_response:

action_history: Opening Cookpad: const p1 = await openTab('https://cookpad.com/');
Searching Cookpad for pancake wheat recipes: await page.locator('e12').fill('pancakes wheat');
Searching Cookpad for pancake wheat recipes: await page.locator('e13').click();
Opening search with excluded keyword URL: await openTab('https://cookpad.com/us/search/pancakes%20wheat?excluded_keywords=beetroot&event=search.filtered_query&order=recent');
